ast.name: error
ast.source: Warning! Postgres only supports 63 characters for query names.
ast.target: 警告！Postgres 仅支持 63 个字符的查询名称。

ast.name: error
ast.source: This can cause conflicts and silent errors executing queries
ast.target: 这可能导致冲突和执行查询时的静默错误

ast.name: error
ast.source: Child expected, but input is not object
ast.target: 期望子项，但输入不是对象

ast.name: error
ast.source: seqof/setof, but data is not Array

ast.name: error
ast.source: Tag could be omitted only for .use()
ast.target: 标签仅在 .use() 时可省略

ast.name: error
ast.source: Decoding of string type: bmpstr length mismatch
ast.target: 解码字符串类型：bmpstr 长度不匹配

ast.name: error
ast.source: Decoding of string type: numstr unsupported characters
ast.target: 解码字符串类型：numstr 包含不支持的字符

ast.name: error
ast.source: Decoding of string type: printstr unsupported characters
ast.target: 解码字符串类型：printstr 包含不支持的字符

ast.name: error
ast.target: 不支持多八位字节标签编码

ast.name: error
ast.source: Encoding of string type: numstr supports only digits and space
ast.target: 编码字符串类型：numstr 仅支持数字和空格

ast.name: error
ast.source: Encoding of string type: printstr supports only latin upper and lower case letters, digits, space, apostrophe, left and rigth parenthesis, plus sign, comma, hyphen, dot, slash, colon, equal sign, question mark
ast.target: 编码字符串类型：printstr 仅支持拉丁大小写字母、数字、空格、撇号、左右括号、加号、逗号、连字符、点、斜杠、冒号、等号、问号

ast.name: error
ast.source: string objid given, but no values map found
ast.target: 提供了字符串 objid，但未找到值映射

ast.name: error
ast.source: objid not found in values map
ast.target: 在值映射中未找到 objid

ast.name: error
ast.target: 第二个 objid 标识符超出范围

ast.name: error
ast.source: String int or enum given, but no values map
ast.target: 提供了字符串 int 或 enum，但没有值映射

ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: 此浏览器缺少 `buffer` v5.x 所需的类型化数组 (Uint8Array) 支持。如果您需要旧版浏览器支持，请使用 `buffer` v4.x。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Please 'npm install wordnet-db' before using WordNet module or specify a dict directory.
ast.target: 请在使用 WordNet 模块前运行 'npm install wordnet-db' 或指定一个字典目录。

ast.name: log
ast.source: additional client error after disconnection due to error
ast.target: 断开连接后由于错误导致的额外客户端错误

ast.name: log
ast.target: 由于超时正在结束客户端连接

ast.name: log
ast.source: ending client due to expired lifetime
ast.target: 由于生命周期到期正在结束客户端连接

ast.name: log
ast.source: No object found with the specified key
ast.target: 未找到具有指定键的对象

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载标签生成器插件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING: password file "%s" is not a plain file
ast.target: 警告：密码文件 \"%s\" 不是普通文件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING: password file "%s" has group or world access; permissions should be u=rw (0600) or less
ast.target: 警告：密码文件 \"%s\" 具有组或全局访问权限；权限应为 u=rw (0600) 或更低

ast.name: warn
ast.source: mongoose: calling `save()` on a subdoc does **not** save the document to MongoDB, it only runs save middleware. Use `subdoc.save({ suppressWarning: true })` to hide this warning if you're sure this behavior is right for your app.
ast.target: mongoose：在子文档上调用 `save()` **不会**将文档保存到 MongoDB，它只运行保存中间件。如果您确定此行为适合您的应用，请使用 `subdoc.save({ suppressWarning: true })` 来隐藏此警告。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Extracting tags from the current note...
ast.target: 正在从当前笔记中提取标签...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No tags found for the current note.
